summary: Frontend-only testing of Gallery CRM redesigned features: Dashboard with Recharts charts, professional car expertise diagram, and pure black theme. All requested features tested and working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows width/height -1 warning on initial load. Charts render correctly after data loads but warning appears repeatedly. Minor UX issue.

passed_tests: Login with demo@aslanbasoto.com / demo123 works correctly
Dashboard: 5 stat cards visible (Stok Araç Sayısı=3, Konsinye Araç Sayısı=1, Kaporası Alınan=0, Bu Ay Satış=0, Kasa Durumu=-₺1,550,000)
Dashboard: Monthly Income/Expense bar chart visible (data-testid='monthly-chart') using Recharts
Dashboard: Vehicle status donut chart visible (data-testid='status-chart') showing Stokta(4) and Konsinye(1)
Dashboard: 'Son İşlemler' list shows recent transactions (Genel Gider, Araç Alımı)
Dashboard: 'Stok Durumu' list shows recent cars (Volkswagen Passat, Audi A4, BMW 320i, Mercedes C180)
Dark theme: Background color is pure black rgb(10,10,10) = #0a0a0a (NOT navy blue)
Expertise tab: 13 clickable body parts visible with green (ORJ) default color
Expertise tab: Clicking parts cycles through statuses correctly (ORJ→BOY→DEĞ→LOK→ORJ)
Expertise tab: Status colors correct - Green(ORJ), Yellow(BOY), Red(DEĞ), Blue(LOK)
Expertise tab: Legend shows 4 statuses (Orijinal, Boyalı, Değişen, Lokal Boyalı)
Expertise tab: Motor Durumu dropdown present with options (Orijinal, Bakımlı, Değişmiş, Sorunlu)
Expertise tab: Şanzıman Durumu dropdown present
Expertise tab: Yürüyen Durumu dropdown present
Expertise tab: Ekspertiz Puanı (%) input present, default 95
Expertise tab: Tramer Kayıt Tutarı input present with amber styling
Expertise tab: Ekspertiz Notları textarea present
Excel export button visible on Inventory (Stok Araçlar) page
Excel export button visible on Customers (Müşteriler) page
Excel export button visible on Finance (Gelir & Gider) page
Vehicle card dropdown has 'Ekspertiz PDF' option
Vehicle card dropdown shows 7 actions: Detay Görüntüle, Düzenle, Masraflar, Ekspertiz PDF, Kapora Al, Satış Yap, Sil
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows console warnings about width/height -1 on initial render. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight props or checking container dimensions before rendering charts.
React hydration warning: span inside select/option elements - this is from dynamic content injection and could cause hydration mismatches in SSR scenarios
Dialog component missing aria-describedby - accessibility warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard features working: 1) Recharts bar chart shows monthly Gelir/Gider data, 2) Recharts pie/donut chart shows vehicle distribution (Stokta, Konsinye, Satıldı, Kapora), 3) 5 stat cards display correct counts. Expertise diagram: hybrid SVG+HTML approach with 13 clickable body parts, status cycle works (green ORJ → yellow BOY → red DEĞ → blue LOK → back to ORJ). Dark theme CSS variables set to pure black (hsl 0 0% 4% for background). All Excel export buttons and Ekspertiz PDF dropdown option verified.

dashboard_charts.monthly_bar_chart: Working - shows 6 months of income(green) vs expense(red)
dashboard_charts.status_donut_chart: Working - shows vehicle distribution by status
